properties.sql: WITH ctx AS (SELECT env.c_code AS envelope_code, env.c_programme_code AS programme_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, env.c_programme_code) AS programme_name, bp.allocated, bp.available, (bp.reserved + bp.pre_committed + bp.committed + bp.expensed) AS used, COALESCE(CAST(d.c_targetvalue AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 0) AS per_applicant, COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a WHERE a.c_applied_programme = env.c_programme_code AND a.c_status IN ('pending_review','pending_data_clarification','pending_operator_review')), 0) AS pending_count FROM app_fd_budget_envelope env JOIN budget_projection bp ON bp.envelope_code = env.c_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = env.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_determinant d ON d.c_code = 'BENEFIT_AMOUNT_' || env.c_programme_code) SELECT envelope_code AS id, 'view →' AS view_link, envelope_code, programme_name, pending_count, to_char(per_applicant, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS per_applicant_disp, to_char(pending_count * per_applicant, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS pending_exposure_disp, to_char(allocated - used, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS available_now_disp, to_char(allocated - used - (pending_count * per_applicant), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS available_after_disp, ROUND(((used + pending_count * per_applicant) * 100.0) / NULLIF(allocated, 0), 1) || '%' AS util_after_pct, CASE WHEN ROUND(((used + pending_count * per_applicant) * 100.0) / NULLIF(allocated, 0), 1) > 100 THEN 'would overshoot' WHEN ROUND(((used + pending_count * per_applicant) * 100.0) / NULLIF(allocated, 0), 1) > 80 THEN 'tight' ELSE 'fits' END AS risk_html FROM ctx WHERE pending_count > 0 ORDER BY (pending_count * per_applicant) DESC, programme_name
properties.countSql: SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_budget_envelope env WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a WHERE a.c_applied_programme = env.c_programme_code AND a.c_status IN ('pending_review','pending_data_clarification','pending_operator_review'))
